mapper.select: SELECT ID, NAME, AUTH FROM MEMBER WHERE ID = #{id} AND PASSWORD=#{password} AND ENABLE='Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEMBER(ID, NAME, PASSWORD, EMAIL, AUTH, ENABLE, JOINDATE) VALUES(#{id}, #{name}, #{password}, #{email}, 'ROLE_USER', 'Y' , CURRENT_DATE)
mapper.select: SELECT ID, NAME, EMAIL, AUTH, ENABLE, JOINDATE FROM MEMBER WHERE ENABLE='Y'
SELECT ID, NAME, EMAIL, AUTH, ENABLE, JOINDATE FROM MEMBER
